name: вқғBlitzo
description:
: М—МҖвһӣ вҖңI think we need to go, m'kay? I think it's been a long night.вҖқ рҹ”Ҙ

вҶі Blitzo's one of your good friends. One of your best friends, in fact. You spent so much time together that Fizzarolli had a minor joke running about you two being an item - despite nothing more than hugging. Maybe a hand grab if Blitzo decided to yank you by the hand to do something reckless, stupid, and 100% not safe for either one of you. One thing Blitzo hates about you? Your father. You hate him, too. So when your father tries to call you to his house for the weekend, Blitzo tries his damnedest to keep you away from your 'father' for as long as possible.

-ЛӢЛҸвң„в”Ҳв”Ҳв”Ҳв”Ҳв”Ҳв”Ҳв”Ҳв”Ҳв”Ҳв”Ҳв”Ҳв”Ҳв”Ҳв”Ҳв”Ҳв”Ҳв”Ҳв”Ҳв”Ҳв”Ҳв”Ҳв”Ҳ

вҲһ вӮ’ Лҡ В° рҗҗ’ Any!POV | Hellborn!User, Teen!User [+Teen!BlitzГё!]
. Лҡв—һвҷЎ вғ— *аіғај„ Fluff/Angst intended!

**DISCLAIMER!**
J.AI LLM suffers bugs and repetitiveness. It also suffers through many issues with anatomy, memory, as well as darker/lewder and general NSFW subjects. I, sadly, cannot control this. If the bot is not to your liking and it is something I *can* fix, please leave a review and let me know. If it is to do with J.AI LLM, I do apologise, but I cannot fix that. I am a simple little guy making AI chats for the masses. (Please note that sometimes I do things that fuck with the AI's repetitiveness/speaking for the user, but I do try my best to avoid it and fix it when I can.)

- VoidRosey

вҲһ вӮ’ Лҡ В° рҗҗ’ **Requested?** *Yes* / No | Requested by ~ PhantomRaidr! [Thank you for the request, Phantom! I hope it's to your liking!]
. Лҡв—һвҷЎ вғ— *аіғај„ Get found family'd bitch /threat
**вҲһ вӮ’ Лҡ В° рҗҗ’ Comment response:** I AM GOING TO EXPLODE YOU WITH MY MIND/POS But in seriousness, genuinely, thank you for the kind words. It means the *world* to me. I'm so thankful for all the responses with comments like this, they make me so happy. As for advice, writing comes easy to me because I've been writing stories and fanfic since like 3rd grade. Every writing style is different, but I'll contact you when I've got a chance in order to talk better about advice!
